title: Kerala High Court comes to aid of disabled toddy tapper
description: The Kerala High Court recently upheld a Lok Adalat order directing Star Health and Allied Insurance to pay ₹7.5 lakhs as compensation to a disabled toddy tapper [Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited v Balakrishnan KM & anr].The toddy tapper had suffered 75 per cent permanent disability after he fell while tapping toddy from a coconut tree. The accident took place during the insurance policy period, but the insurance claim was filed after some delay. Star Health refused to pay the
